channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Cleveland Clinic and G42 join forces to drive AI-Powered healthcare innovation
item.description: Cleveland Clinic and G42 have entered into a strategic collaboration to advance the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare, marking yet another major step in realizing AI’s potential in medicine.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: US robotics companies push for national strategy, including a central office, to compete with China
item.description: American robotics companies are pushing for a national robotics strategy, including a central government robotics office, to promote the industry at a time that Beijing is making intelligent robots a top national priority.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Support for TikTok ban plunged over past 2 years: Poll
item.description: The number of Americans who support banning TikTok has fallen dramatically over the past two years, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Signalgate: There’s an IT lesson here
item.description: You know how IT admins are always warning employees about best practices for security? They’re always mandating which apps to use, which to avoid and which devices can safely connect to corporate networks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Broadcom warns of worrying security flaws affecting VMware tools
item.description: A fix for an authentication bypass vulnerability was recently released, and VMware users should apply it ASAP.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: US adds Chinese tech firms to its export control list, says they sought US knowhow for military use
item.description: The U.S. has added dozens of companies to its export control, including more than 50 based in China that it says sought advanced knowhow in supercomputing, artificial intelligence and quantum technology for military purposes.
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Vibe Coding: Revolutionizing the Way We Code
item.description: Discover how vibe coding is changing the game with Claude Code's large language model, tuned specifically for developers and building things in code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What you need to know about Go, Rust, and Zig
item.description: Every language has a life cycle. Sometimes it starts with a relatively narrow use case and escapes its container; sometimes it’s intended as a general-purpose language but finds a powerful niche instead.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Researchers in limbo as Columbia bows to Trump’s demands in bid to restore $400M federal funding
item.description: Researchers at Columbia University remain in limbo after the Ivy League institution bowed to the Trump administration’s demands for unprecedented changes in a bid to restore some $400 million in federal funds cut.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative
item.description: The Trump administration has a '10 out, one in' rule for new regulations, but DoD officials are confident they can finalize the CMMC requirements soon. The post DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: War plans group chat raises questions about Signal, cybersecurity
item.description: Top Trump administration national security officials' use of the messaging app Signal is raising new questions about the platform and how the administration is transmitting sensitive government information.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Isar Aerospace Scrubs Launch Attempt Due to Unfavorable Winds
item.description: Munich-based Isar Aerospace postpones the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle, Spectrum, from Norway due to unfavorable winds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise targets IoT, industrial networks with private 5G package
item.description: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise (ALE) has partnered with Celona to offer a turnkey private 5G package for industrial or IoT networks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Napster sold to tech startup for $207M
item.description: Napster was sold to a tech start-up Infinite Reality for $207 million, the digital media company announced Tuesday, as it looks to provide creators an opportunity to better engage with their audiences and monetize their work.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference set for June 9
item.description: Apple will host its annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) online from June 9-13, with a small number of developers and students invited to attend in person for the keynote and state of the union announcements at Apple Park.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: World Backup Day is March 31
item.description: Are you ready? World Backup Day is March 31, a day that has been recognized every year since it was first set up in 2011.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: America's smallest EV truck prototype has arrived
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how this super-small electric mini-truck takes a big step toward production.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GSA’s overhaul of FedRAMP contingent on automation
item.description: The General Services Administration will release details of FedRAMP 2025 today outlining a much different program focused mostly on standards and policies. The post GSA’s overhaul of FedRAMP contingent on automation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Nvidia joins Trump onshoring push
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia launches research center to accelerate quantum computing breakthrough
item.description: In a strategic move that could reshape the future of computing, Nvidia is establishing the Nvidia Accelerated Quantum Research Center (NVAQC) in Boston, where the worlds of quantum hardware and AI supercomputing will converge to tackle what many consider computing’s final frontier.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The White House Seeks to Revive Centralized Procurement
item.description: The White House is expected to sign an executive order that would bring centralized procurement back to the government, with GSA taking charge of buying common goods and services.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network
